name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = -1
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ fileChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = <<>>

SendChunk ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ fileChunks' = Tail(fileChunks)
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0

Retransmit ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(channel))
    /\ channel' = Tail(channel)
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

DropChunk ==
    /\ channel' = Tail(channel)
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in channel : 
        /\ \E action \in {SendChunk, Retransmit, DropChunk} : action
    \/ \E chunk \in fileChunks : 
        /\ \E action \in {SendChunk, DropChunk} : action

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>
